button.startAgainDescription: You've already completed the tutorial. Would you like to go through it again?

overlay.skipConfirmMessage: This will mark the tutorial as complete. You can always restart it from the "Show Tutorial" button in the sidebar.
overlay.completeConfirmMessage: You've completed the tutorial! Mark it as done so it doesn't show automatically again?

1.title: Base Maps Tab
1.content: Click on the Base Maps tab to see different map styles you can use as the background.

2.title: Choose a Base Map
2.content: Choose any base map you like from here. Each gives you a different visual style for the map background.

3.title: Data Tab
3.content: Click on the Data tab to see all available data layers you can overlay on the map.

4.title: Explore Data Layers
4.content: Browse and activate any layer you want. Layers contain different types of geospatial data like land cover, vegetation, and more.

5.title: Report Invalid Data
5.content: Found incorrect data? Click this button to report issues. You can draw a shape around the problem area and submit it for review.

6.title: Country Selector
6.content: Use this to zoom to any African country and see its boundaries clearly.

7.title: Compare Layers
7.content: Click this to compare two different layers side by side. Great for seeing changes over time or comparing different data types.

8.title: Statistics
8.content: Calculate land cover statistics for any area you draw. Useful for quantitative analysis of specific regions.

9.title: AI Assistant
9.content: Need help? Click here to chat with our AI assistant. Ask questions about the map, data, or any features.

10.title: Tutorial Complete!
10.content: You've learned all the key features! Click "End Tour" to mark it as complete. You can always restart it from the "Show Tutorial" button in the sidebar.
